title: Opening for Store Manager at Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions:
Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Heritage Foods Retail Ventures Solutions!
